rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 23, 2007, LINE 8. PETITIONER C.A.C.V. OF COLORADO, L.L.C.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. =(302/PJB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 23, 2007, LINE 9. PETITIONER EDEN-VILLA-SAN FRANCISCO'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. THE SANCTION AWARD RUNS AGAINST THE PARTY, NOT ITS ATTORNEY. THE REQUEST FOR A COST WAIVER IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHOW COMPLIANCE WITH C.C.P SECTION 1284.3(B)(3) OR OTHER MEANS OF REQUESTING THE ARBITRATION COMPANY NOT TO ASSESS FEES OR COSTS. =(302/PJB)
